name: vision
description: Real-time multimodal behavioral analysis. MediaPipe FaceMesh + Pose + Hands → 20-D AU/gaze + 12-D pose features; HSEmotion EfficientNet → valence/arousal; Wav2Vec2 + StudentNet → audio stress (StudentNet head is fallback when weights are absent). Welford 45s personal-baseline calibration. Multi-dimension fusion → Cognitive Load / Emotional Arousal / Engagement Level / Confidence Level. Session aggregator + PDF/JSON reports.

capabilities.name: start_session
capabilities.description: Create a new behavioral-analysis session with calibration timer.

capabilities.name: mark_question
capabilities.description: Annotate the timeline with an interviewer question label at now().

capabilities.name: get_report
capabilities.description: Return the JSON behavioral report for a session.
